description_long: This is a rectangular cabinet with a luxurious black marble top featuring striking gold veining. The body of the cabinet is finished in a light, wood-textured material, giving it a modern and elegant appearance. The front face is equipped with six prominent, oval-shaped gold handles, suggesting the presence of multiple drawers. The sides and back are plain, with the same light wood finish and no visible hardware or openings. The base is slightly recessed, providing a subtle shadow line and a sense of stability. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for upscale urban interiors or lobbies.
description: A modern cabinet with a black marble top, gold-veined pattern, light wood body, and six gold handles on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing six gold handles on a light wood surface beneath a black marble top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain light wood panel and the marble top, with no handles or openings visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without handles, showing only the light wood panel and marble top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with a plain light wood panel and marble top.
